atomic_facts.fact: The frame displays white text on a black background.
The text is a list of instructions under the heading 'Teach them to...'.
The list contains six bullet points marked with asterisks.

ocr: *Pop in one spot with out looking down
*Pop and land on the balls of the feet
*The balls of your feet our bouncy!
*Using a long rope to teach this works well.
*When they can pop and stay in one spot- get the rope.
*Pop on two feet at the same time.

atomic_facts.fact: A child stands on a paved surface in front of a white wall or garage door.
The child's shirt features a large, realistic spider image on the front.
A shovel is leaning against the wall to the right of the child.
Instructional text appears on a black background detailing 'Tap - Tap' and 'Turn - Wait' techniques.

ocr: *Tapping knuckles together in front keeps hands by the sides instead of by the head.
*Teaches them to turn the rope with hand at the sides.
*And keeps them from jumping when they first start learning to turn.
spatial: The video cuts from a shot of a child standing centrally in front of a white wall with a shovel to the right, to a full-screen black slide with white text instructions.

atomic_facts.fact: The screen displays a black background with white text.
The title text reads 'Add The Trap'.
The text lists instructions about trapping a rope under feet.
The final line of text states 'No jumping yet...'.

ocr: *Teach them to trap the rope under the feet as it comes down in front.
*This teaches them to keep hands to sides and to start getting the timing down.
